name: Frosted Light
description: Classic frosted glass on a gradient background — translucent white with blur.

name: Frosted Dark
description: Dark glass panel with deep blur — ideal for overlays on rich backgrounds.

name: Tinted Purple
description: Colored glass tint — a purple hue frosted panel with matching border glow.

name: Tinted Cyan
description: Cyan-tinted frosted glass panel — electric and vivid.

name: Glass Navbar
description: Sticky frosted navbar with blur and hairline border — a SaaS staple.

name: Glass Modal
description: Full glassmorphism modal overlay with blurred backdrop and gradient border.

name: Glass Button
description: Frosted glass button with hover highlight effect.

name: Glass Input
description: Floating glass input field with focus ring and translucent fill.

name: Highlight Card
description: Glass card with a bright inner top highlight simulating refracted light.

name: Glass Tag/Badge
description: Compact frosted badge / tag — perfect for labels on dark backgrounds.

name: Glass Sidebar
description: Vertical frosted sidebar panel with translucent items and hover state.

name: Gradient Border Glass
description: Glass card wrapped in a vivid gradient border using padding technique.

name: Glass Notification
description: Floating frosted notification toast — perfect for alerts and messages.

name: Glass Tooltip
description: Frosted tooltip that appears on hover — with a subtle arrow using CSS.

name: Layered Glass
description: Stacked glass panels at different opacity levels to simulate depth.
